name: Keebler Soft Batch Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the butter, eggs, molasses, vanilla extract, and water in a medium bowl until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the granulated sugar, packed brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and all-purpose flour.
4. Gradually combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Add the chocolate chips to the dough and mix gently until evenly distributed.
6. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 1 inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
